message.content:
Validate RECO-803 branch by running tests. The branch fixes ESLint warnings in frequently-bought-together.service.ts.

1. Run: `git checkout RECO-803-fix-eslint-fbt-service`
2. Run tests: `npx dotenv -e .env.test -- npx jest --config ./test/jest-unit.config.ts -- frequently-bought-together 2>&1 | tail -50`
3. If tests fail, read failures carefully. The changes converted positional params to named object params. Fix test assertions and call sites in test files.
4. If fixes, commit --no-verify and push --no-verify
5. Run: `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20`
6. Switch back: `git checkout main`

Commit message: "RECO-803: fix tests\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>"
Report: PASS or FAIL.

content.text: I'll validate the RECO-803 branch by running tests and checking for any issues.
